training logs

Week 21: Getting there

Five weeks of no running.

Christopher Machicoane-Hurtaud/Unsplash

Week 20: Pain-free

Finally finishing rides without much of any ache in the bone.

Week 19: A true loss

Missing Sarah's grandma, Carol.

Week 18: Less wrenched

Fixed my bike. Still resting to fix my foot.

Week 17: Weak off

Taking a week to recover... and build this website.

Week 16: Fractured

A stress fracture in my fifth metatarsal means I won't be running for many weeks.
